avery-mead-1959-surfactant.notes: Foundational description of pulmonary surfactant deficiency in preterm lungs.
avery-mead-1959-surfactant.title: Surface Properties in Relation to Atelectasis and Hyaline Membrane Disease

battaglia-meschia-1986-fetal-metabolism.notes: Reference text for fetal oxygen consumption, glucose utilisation rates. Dependents: data/parameters/fetal/metabolism.toml (oxygen-consumption-ml-per-kg-per-min, glucose-utilisation-mg-per-kg-per-min).
battaglia-meschia-1986-fetal-metabolism.title: An Introduction to Fetal Physiology

bauer-1969-fetal-hb-affinity.notes: Foundational study comparing adult vs fetal haemoglobin O2 affinity; HbF P50 measured directly.
bauer-1969-fetal-hb-affinity.title: Factors governing the oxygen affinity of human adult and foetal blood

baumann-2002-glut3.notes: GLUT3 expression and function across gestation. Dependents: data/parameters/placenta/glucose_transport.toml (glut3-km-mmol-per-l, glut3-vmax-per-area).
baumann-2002-glut3.title: Placental Glucose Transfer and Fetal Growth

bernstein-ziegler-2001-plasma-volume.notes: Quantifies first-trimester plasma volume rise. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/blood.toml (plasma-volume-l).
bernstein-ziegler-2001-plasma-volume.title: Plasma Volume Expansion in Early Pregnancy

brace-1989-amniotic-fluid.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
brace-1989-amniotic-fluid.notes: Reference AFV trajectory: rises through 32-34 weeks, peaks ~800 mL, declines toward term.
brace-1989-amniotic-fluid.title: Normal amniotic fluid volume changes throughout pregnancy

brown-2011-glut3.notes: Quantitative GLUT3 expression by gestational age. Dependents: data/parameters/placenta/glucose_transport.toml (glut3-vmax-per-area).
brown-2011-glut3.title: Glucose transporter 3 (GLUT3) protein expression in human placenta across gestation

buck-louis-2015-nichd-growth.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology

buck-louis-2015-nichd-growth.title: Racial/ethnic standards for fetal growth: the NICHD Fetal Growth Studies

burri-2006-lung-development.notes: Lung structural development through saccular and alveolar phases.
burri-2006-lung-development.title: Structural Aspects of Postnatal Lung Development – Alveolar Formation and Growth

burton-2010-placental-development.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
burton-2010-placental-development.notes: Review of placental morphology and oxygenation transitions across gestation.
burton-2010-placental-development.title: What is the placenta?

carr-1981-cortisol.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
carr-1981-cortisol.title: Maternal plasma adrenocorticotropin and cortisol relationships throughout human pregnancy

carter-2009-placental-development.notes: Comparative morphometry and gas transfer in the human placenta. Dependents: data/parameters/placenta/structure.toml (term-area-m2).
carter-2009-placental-development.title: Evolution of Factors Affecting Placental Oxygen Transfer

carter-pijnenborg-2011-gas-exchange.journal: Best Practice & Research Clinical Obstetrics & Gynaecology
carter-pijnenborg-2011-gas-exchange.title: Evolution of invasive placentation with special reference to non-human primates

catalano-1991-insulin-sensitivity.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
catalano-1991-insulin-sensitivity.notes: Insulin sensitivity (HOMA-IR-equivalent) falls ~50% in late pregnancy.
catalano-1991-insulin-sensitivity.title: Longitudinal changes in insulin release and insulin resistance in nonobese pregnant women

cheung-lafayette-2013-renal.notes: GFR rise and creatinine fall across normal pregnancy. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/renal.toml (gfr-ml-per-min, plasma-creatinine-mg-per-dl).
cheung-lafayette-2013-renal.title: Renal Physiology of Pregnancy

cleal-lewis-2008-amino-acid.notes: Placental amino acid system A and L kinetics.
cleal-lewis-2008-amino-acid.title: The Mechanisms and Regulation of Placental Amino Acid Transport to the Human Foetus

cole-2010-hcg.notes: hCG kinetics: peak ~10 weeks, decline to ~10,000 mIU/mL at term.
cole-2010-hcg.title: Biological functions of hCG and hCG-related molecules

conrad-2001-relaxin-gfr.journal: Journal of the Society for Gynecologic Investigation
conrad-2001-relaxin-gfr.notes: Mechanistic review: relaxin-mediated systemic and renal vasodilation; ~50% GFR rise.
conrad-2001-relaxin-gfr.title: Mechanisms of renal vasodilation and hyperfiltration during pregnancy

crapo-1996-pregnancy-respiratory.notes: Reference ranges for respiratory function in pregnancy. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/respiratory.toml (tidal-volume-ml).
crapo-1996-pregnancy-respiratory.title: Normal Cardiopulmonary Physiology During Pregnancy

dash-bassingthwaighte-2010-o2-hb.notes: Modern revision of the O2-Hb and CO2-Hb dissociation curves incorporating Bohr/Haldane effects. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/blood.toml (oxyhb-bohr-coefficient).
dash-bassingthwaighte-2010-o2-hb.title: Erratum to: Blood HbO2 and HbCO2 Dissociation Curves at Varied O2, CO2, pH, 2,3-DPG and Temperature Levels

davison-1981-osmoregulation.journal: British Journal of Obstetrics and Gynaecology
davison-1981-osmoregulation.notes: Foundational reference for the ~10 mOsm/kg osmolality drop and the ~5 mEq/L plasma sodium drop.
davison-1981-osmoregulation.title: Plasma osmolality and urinary concentration and dilution during and after pregnancy

davison-hytten-1974-gfr.journal: BJOG: An International Journal of Obstetrics & Gynaecology
davison-hytten-1974-gfr.notes: Foundational paired-clearance study of pregnancy GFR. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/renal.toml (gfr-ml-per-min).
davison-hytten-1974-gfr.title: GLOMERULAR FILTRATION DURING AND AFTER PREGNANCY

de-haas-2017-plasma-volume-meta.notes: Systematic review of plasma-volume expansion in singleton pregnancy. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/blood.toml (plasma-volume-l).
de-haas-2017-plasma-volume-meta.title: Physiological adaptation of maternal plasma volume during pregnancy: a systematic review and meta-analysis

dunlop-1981-renal-plasma-flow.journal: British Journal of Obstetrics and Gynaecology
dunlop-1981-renal-plasma-flow.notes: Foundational longitudinal RPF/GFR study; basis for the bell-shaped RPF trajectory.
dunlop-1981-renal-plasma-flow.title: Serial changes in renal haemodynamics during normal human pregnancy

glinoer-1997-thyroid.notes: Canonical review of thyroid axis adaptation; TSH suppression in T1 by hCG.
glinoer-1997-thyroid.title: The regulation of thyroid function in pregnancy: pathways of endocrine adaptation from physiology to pathology

grewal-2018-nichd-growth.notes: Cohort design and biometric measurements for the NICHD studies. Dependents: data/parameters/fetal/growth.toml (biparietal-diameter-mm, femur-length-mm).
grewal-2018-nichd-growth.title: Cohort Profile: NICHD Fetal Growth Studies–Singletons and Twins

hadlock-1991-fetal-weight.notes: Reference biometric formulae for estimated fetal weight. Dependents: data/parameters/fetal/growth.toml (estimated-fetal-weight-g).
hadlock-1991-fetal-weight.title: In utero analysis of fetal growth: a sonographic weight standard.

handwerger-2010-hpl.notes: hPL physiology review; rises linearly through gestation, ~5-10 ug/mL at term.
handwerger-2010-hpl.title: The physiology of placental lactogen in human pregnancy

hunter-robson-1992-cardiac-output.notes: Echocardiographic CO and SV across gestation. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/cardio.toml (cardiac-output-spread-weeks, cardiac-output-individual-sigma).
hunter-robson-1992-cardiac-output.title: Adaptation of the maternal heart in pregnancy

hytten-chamberlain-1980-blood-volume.notes: Reference text for plasma volume and red-cell mass trajectories across normal pregnancy. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/blood.toml (blood-volume-l, plasma-volume-l, red-cell-mass-l).
hytten-chamberlain-1980-blood-volume.title: Clinical Physiology in Obstetrics

illsley-2000-glut1.notes: GLUT1 Vmax/Km on syncytiotrophoblast membranes. Dependents: data/parameters/placenta/glucose_transport.toml (glut1-km-mmol-per-l, glut1-vmax-per-area).
illsley-2000-glut1.title: CURRENT TOPIC: Glucose Transporters in the Human Placenta

kelman-1966-o2-saturation.notes: Original digital implementation of O2 saturation calculations; reference for temperature corrections.
kelman-1966-o2-saturation.title: Digital computer subroutine for the conversion of oxygen tension into saturation.

kiserud-2000-fetal-circulation.notes: Ductus venosus shunting and umbilical venous return. Dependents: data/parameters/fetal/circulation.toml (systemic-venous-return-po2-mmhg).
kiserud-2000-fetal-circulation.title: The ductus venosus

kiserud-2001-umbilical-vein.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
kiserud-2001-umbilical-vein.notes: Umbilical vein flow Doppler reference; DV shunt fraction ~30% at term.
kiserud-2001-umbilical-vein.title: Blood flow and the degree of shunting through the ductus venosus in the human fetus

kline-2005-d-dimer.notes: D-dimer values across trimesters; basis for adjusted thresholds in VTE workup.
kline-2005-d-dimer.title: D-dimer concentrations in normal pregnancy: new diagnostic thresholds are needed

larsson-2008-serum-proteins.notes: Reference intervals for serum proteins across pregnancy.
larsson-2008-serum-proteins.title: Reference values for clinical chemistry tests during normal pregnancy

lomauro-aliverti-2015-respiratory.notes: Minute ventilation, tidal volume, PaCO2 changes in pregnancy. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/respiratory.toml (minute-ventilation-l-per-min, paco2-mmhg, pao2-mmhg).
lomauro-aliverti-2015-respiratory.title: Respiratory physiology of pregnancy

mahendru-2014-cardiac-output.notes: Longitudinal CO, SV, HR, MAP across normal pregnancy. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/cardio.toml (baseline-cardiac-output, peak-excess-cardiac-output, cardiac-output-peak-week, baseline-map, map-nadir-drop, map-nadir-week).
mahendru-2014-cardiac-output.title: A longitudinal study of maternal cardiovascular function from preconception to the postpartum period

mayhew-1986-gas-diffusion.notes: Diffusing capacity for O2 across the placental membrane at term. Dependents: data/parameters/placenta/gas_transport.toml (half-saturation-area-m2, max-equilibration).
mayhew-1986-gas-diffusion.title: Microscopical morphology of the human placenta and its effects on oxygen diffusion: a morphometric model

mayhew-2014-placental-morphometry.notes: Villous surface area, membrane thickness, intervillous volume from stereology. Dependents: data/parameters/placenta/structure.toml (initial-area-m2, term-area-m2, midpoint-week, growth-rate-per-week, membrane-thickness-um, intervillous-volume-ml).
mayhew-2014-placental-morphometry.title: Morphomics: An integral part of systems biology of the human placenta

pitkin-1979-wbc.notes: Reference values for WBC and platelets in pregnancy.
pitkin-1979-wbc.title: Platelet and leukocyte counts in pregnancy

rudolph-1985-fetal-circulation.notes: Streamline routing through foramen ovale and ductus arteriosus. Dependents: data/parameters/fetal/circulation.toml (foramen-ovale-streamline-preference, ductus-arteriosus-share).
rudolph-1985-fetal-circulation.title: Distribution and regulation of blood flow in the fetal and neonatal lamb.

sanghavi-rutherford-2014-cardio-review.notes: Review summary of pregnancy cardiovascular adaptation. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/cardio.toml (map-spread-weeks, map-individual-sigma).
sanghavi-rutherford-2014-cardio-review.title: Cardiovascular Physiology of Pregnancy

severinghaus-1979-o2-hb-dissociation.notes: Adult O2-Hb dissociation curve (Hill coefficient, P50). Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/blood.toml (o2-hb-hill-coefficient-maternal, o2-hb-p50-maternal).
severinghaus-1979-o2-hb-dissociation.title: Simple, accurate equations for human blood O2 dissociation computations

sutton-1991-fetal-cardiac.notes: Doppler-derived foramen ovale and pulmonary flow distribution.
sutton-1991-fetal-cardiac.title: Assessment of changes in blood flow through the lungs and foramen ovale in the normal human fetus with gestational age: a prospective Doppler echocardiographic study.

templeton-1976-blood-gas.notes: Reference for non-pregnant and pregnant PaO2, PaCO2, A-a gradient.
templeton-1976-blood-gas.title: Maternal blood-gases, PAo2-Pao2, hysiological shunt and VD/VT in normal pregnancy

thaler-1990-uterine-flow.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
thaler-1990-uterine-flow.notes: Doppler-derived uterine artery flow from early to late pregnancy. Dependents: data/parameters/maternal/cardio.toml (baseline-uterine-flow, term-uterine-flow, uterine-flow-growth-rate, uterine-flow-individual-sigma).
thaler-1990-uterine-flow.title: Changes in uterine blood flow during human pregnancy

tulchinsky-1972-steroids.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
tulchinsky-1972-steroids.notes: Foundational longitudinal steroid hormone profile across pregnancy.
tulchinsky-1972-steroids.title: Plasma estrone, estradiol, estriol, progesterone, and 17-hydroxyprogesterone in human pregnancy

tyson-1972-prolactin.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
tyson-1972-prolactin.title: Studies of prolactin secretion in human pregnancy

von-steinburg-2013-fhr.notes: Longitudinal FHR reference: ~170 bpm in T1 falling to ~140 bpm at term.
von-steinburg-2013-fhr.title: What is the normal fetal heart rate?

wilson-1980-renin-aldosterone.title: Blood pressure, the renin-aldosterone system and sex steroids throughout normal pregnancy

acharya-2005-umbilical-pi.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
acharya-2005-umbilical-pi.notes: Reference ranges for umbilical-artery PI across gestation; PI falls smoothly from ~1.5 at 16 weeks to ~0.8 at term as placental vascular resistance drops.
acharya-2005-umbilical-pi.title: Reference ranges for serial measurements of umbilical artery Doppler indices in the second half of pregnancy

mari-1995-mca-pi.journal: American Journal of Obstetrics and Gynecology
mari-1995-mca-pi.notes: Middle cerebral artery PI rises through the second trimester, peaks ~28 weeks, then falls as fetal cerebral vasodilation reduces resistance near term.
mari-1995-mca-pi.title: Middle cerebral artery flow velocity waveforms in normal and small-for-gestational-age fetuses
